access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed via NCBI E-utilities.
access_attempts.notes: Extraction uses abstract-level results for this baseline pass.

name: Tadalafil alleviates muscle ischemia in patients with Becker muscular dystrophy.
summary: Randomized placebo-controlled crossover study in men with Becker muscular dystrophy testing whether single-dose tadalafil restores nitric-oxide/cGMP-mediated regulation of exercising skeletal-muscle blood flow and alleviates functional muscle ischemia.
